value.found_quote: Browse reviewed connectors in the [Anthropic Directory](https://claude.ai/directory). Directory connectors use the same MCP infrastructure as Claude Code, so you can add any remote server listed there with `claude mcp add`.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Anthropic Directory as a registry of reviewed connectors that can be added to Claude Code using `claude mcp add`. The page also mentions examples of tools like GitHub, Slack (via "Integrate designs...posted in Slack"), and other services. The claim about the Directory supporting desktop, VS Code, web, and Claude.ai surfaces is partially corroborated by a reference to "claude.ai connectors" in the scope hierarchy section. The core elements of the claim — a registry of reviewed connectors addable via `claude mcp add` — are clearly substantiated by the page.
